basic_details.job_title: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IITH) has published the Library Trainee Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 10 Library Trainee positions on a contract basis. Candidates up to 25 years of age holding a Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS) degree are eligible to apply online on or before 04 August 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GoI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS)
qualification.details: Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS) with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA (or First Class as defined by the awarding Institute/University). The applicant must have passed MLIS examination in either 2025 or 2026 only. Basic knowledge of IT and IT applications related to libraries is desirable

salary_details.details: Consolidated Remuneration of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_hyderabad: Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS)

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Hyderabad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Vacancy Details 2026
IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS) with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA (or First Class as defined by the awarding Institute/University). The applicant must have passed MLIS examination in either 2025 or 2026 only. Basic knowledge of IT and IT applications related to libraries is desirable

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 25 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per GoI rules.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Salary 2026
content_sections.text: Consolidated Remuneration of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.event: Last date for submission of Online Application

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Hyderabad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee recruitment is August 4, 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Library and Information Science (MLIS) degree with at least 60% marks or equivalent CGPA, obtained in either 2025 or 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Library Trainee position is 25 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Library Trainee post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies for the Library Trainee position at IIT Hyderabad.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Library Trainee role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated remuneration of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications for the IIT Hyderabad Library Trainee recruitment must be submitted online through the provided link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interaction.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad).

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for the Library Trainee position?
faq.answer: The Library Trainee position is on a contract basis.
